content: User: Can you give me a rundown please? On the end of the day? | Jarvis: Both GPU and local systems are down, Sir. GPU: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=11436): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/chat (Caused by NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPConnection object at 0x154257d10>: Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 61] Connection refused')).
